hero.title: Your Organization's
hero.description: OpenComp helps European organizations achieve true digital sovereignty. We build systems that remain understandable, auditable and operable over time - even as vendors, regulations and geopolitical conditions change.

providers.title: Choose between
providers.subtitle: many AI providers
providers.description: Avoid getting trapped in a single eco-system - switch between providers with your chat history and documents intact

compass.title: OpenComp
compass.description: OpenComp exists within your own local network, however it can also connect to the internet to access the latest models from providers like ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. This allows you to use OpenComp offline when privacy is a priority, or connect to the internet when you need the latest models.

polaris.title: Morpheus
polaris.description: Morpheus helps organisations take control of their communication by switching to open protocols like Matrix. Break free from closed systems like MS Teams and Zoom.

features.title: Why Choose
features.subtitle: OpenComp
features.description: Built with core values of sovereignty, privacy, and control

privacy.title: Data Sovereignty
privacy.description: Your data stays under your control. No third parties can access your communications without your explicit permission.

bestOfBoth.title: Protocol Independence
bestOfBoth.description: Switch between communication protocols and providers. Your organization should not be locked into any single vendor.

ownership.title: Vendor Independence
ownership.description: Build systems that remain operable even as vendors change their terms, raise prices, or exit markets. Your infrastructure should adapt to you, not the other way around.

openSource.title: Full Transparency
openSource.description: Open source codebase you can audit yourself. Verify the security and privacy claims - no black boxes.

offline.title: Offline Capable
offline.description: Works without an internet connection. Perfect for sensitive communications or when resilience is a priority.

customizable.title: Fully Customizable
customizable.description: Adapt OpenComp to your organization's specific needs with custom integrations, themes, and workflows.

authentication.title: Flexible Authentication
authentication.description: Connect with your existing identity provider - Microsoft Entra, Google Workspace, SAML, or your own directory.

documents.title: Document Control
documents.description: Keep full control over your documents and files. No vendor lock-in for your organization's knowledge.

characters.title: Audit Friendly
characters.description: Every interaction can be logged and audited. Maintain compliance while preserving operational efficiency.

contact.title: Get In
contact.subtitle: Touch
contact.description: Interested in digital sovereignty for your organization? Reach out through any of these channels.

form.subject: Subject
form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! Your email client will open now.

download.title: Our
download.subtitle: Products
download.description: Explore our platforms for achieving digital sovereignty

footer.description: Helping European organizations achieve digital sovereignty through open, auditable, and controllable systems.
